MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjusication
Off Calendar Aug-28-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjusication.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjusication granted. No opposition filed.

Order and separate judgment both signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EPS)
